notes: Thin glue file (175 lines, 10 decls) providing scalar specializations of endomorphism trace and the Silverman III.6.3 degree quadratic form restricted to the mulByInt case; all proofs are rfl or short ring computations with no sorry or heartbeat overrides. Heavy external consumers include DegreeQuadraticForm.lean, GapSpines.lean, Frobenius.lean and numerous Hasse/WeilPairing files. A comment records that general 1-alpha / r*alpha-s placeholders were deleted 2026-05-28 because no genuine function-field pullback exists for non-scalar endomorphisms.
